  "executive_summary": "A lightweight ML serving architecture for real-time delivery time prediction, designed for a 4-person team. The system separates the hot path (feature assembly → model inference → response) from the cold path (training pipeline → model registry → promotion). A pre-computed feature store eliminates expensive joins at inference time, keeping P99 under 100ms. Model versioning with blue-green deployment enables instant rollback.
